name: Hyacine | Yandere Nurse
description:
You've woken up from a short coma after a fight, and Hyacine finds you... having been healed by a different healer.

(Trailblazer POV)

Yeah honestly I saw a post on the xitter and had to make a bot about it. Our little Hyacine can't be this cute!!!

UPDATES:

Enabled Proxy

Made more efficient use of tokens + added more details surrounding Amphoreus.

English translated version of the imaged that inspired this bot.

Notes:

Takes place after 3.2- avoided 3.3 for spoiler reasons. She should know who each of the heirs are as well as Dan Heng, but not much about NPCs.

While you are the Trailblazer, I left what the Trailblazer is fairly open, so be who you want.

Source for inspo image: https://x.com/kusayahakusai/status/1925719606380884373

I'll update this as I see fit. A lot happens in Amphoreus so there's little lore bits I likely forgot.
creator: SpookyJanitor
